scripts.dev: cross-env AI_CANVAS_DATABASE_PATH=../../.data/ai-canvas.sqlite UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run ai-canvas-worker serve
scripts.server: cross-env AI_CANVAS_DATABASE_PATH=../../.data/ai-canvas.sqlite UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run ai-canvas-worker serve
scripts.build: cross-env UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python -m compileall src
scripts.lint: cross-env UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python -m compileall src
scripts.typecheck: cross-env UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python -m compileall src
